note: Levels are defined in docs/MATURITY_LEVELS.md and enforced by `cargo run -p xtask -- check-maturity`. A capability sits at the highest level its RECORDED evidence meets, not the level anyone hopes it reaches. Promotions are events the claim-integrity gate (bead f85xj.2.3) inspects; demotions are always allowed. Nothing here is L4 or L5, because the external V&V corpus (e04) and any written support policy do not exist yet -- that is the honest state, not an oversight.

capabilities.title: Evidence colours and conservative composition
capabilities.notes: G0 algebraic laws green: composition cannot outrank its weakest operand. Not L3 -- no e2e lane exercises colour composition across a full study.

capabilities.title: Content-addressed evidence packages and solver-free re-checking
capabilities.notes: Merkle roots, deny-all verification and the Phase-0A release gate are tested. Structural integrity is NOT authenticity: authority requires a caller-supplied verifier and an independent trust channel.

capabilities.title: Region/chart abstraction and conversion with recorded error authority
capabilities.notes: Conversion promotes to Enclosure only from an ExactDistance source; everything else stays Estimate. The sheaf seam result means agreement at retained finite interface samples -- not watertightness.

capabilities.title: Self-intersection and manifoldness certificates on triangle soups
capabilities.notes: Exact predicates decide every pair including vertex-sharing ones; non-finite input refuses rather than passing. Exactly-degenerate faces are REFUSED, not analysed -- a soup containing one carries no non-intersection claim.

capabilities.title: Deterministic sparse assembly and cross-format SpMV
capabilities.notes: Cross-format bitwise equality is an independent check, not only a golden: COO/CSR/BSR/SELL are separate implementations agreeing exactly.

capabilities.title: Outward-rounded intervals and exact geometric predicates
capabilities.notes: Containment under randomized expression trees is the independent oracle. Rigor is conditional on fs-math ULP budgets, per the crate's own no-claim section.

capabilities.title: Resumable Krylov solves with typed residual provenance
capabilities.notes: Held at L2 with a known gap: bead f85xj.2.24 is open -- SolveReport itself still does not carry which of three residual quantities it holds, so a driver seeing only a report cannot tell. Do not promote until that closes.

capabilities.title: IFT adjoints and the gradient verification gate
capabilities.notes: Finite differences are the independent check. The gate now counts informative directions, so a bit-insensitive probe cannot score a pass.

capabilities.title: Certify-or-escalate quality-diversity campaign (point-vortex thruster)
capabilities.notes: Deliberately NOT L3 despite being an e2e crate: impulse conservation is a screen, every drift is Estimated, and no interval certificate exists for the QoI. A validated drift bound needs validated integration in fs-vpm.

capabilities.title: Claim-integrity defect class, inventory, and burn-down
capabilities.notes: Definition, taxonomy, doc lint and inventory lane are live; one full sweep completed and 40 of 47 defects closed. Not L3 until the promotion gate (f85xj.2.3) actually blocks a promotion.

capabilities.title: Capability maturity registry and promotion events
capabilities.notes: This registry itself. L1 until a rehearsed promotion and a rehearsed blocked-promotion are both demonstrated through the e02 gate.

capabilities.title: Steady conduction FEM solve on solids
capabilities.notes: The cooling vertical's core capability, bead f85xj.5.1, is NOT yet built -- the exterior-calculus and elasticity substrate it will sit on exists, the thermal solve does not. L1 is the honest level and the registry says so rather than crediting the substrate.

capabilities.title: Design ledger: artifacts, operations, lineage, time travel
capabilities.notes: DEMOTED in substance, not in record -- this crate did not compile until 2026-07-22 and its suite now shows 5 failures (bead frankensim-fs-ledger-latent-failures-xys1z), including an evidence-binding guard that does not hold. No test evidence is cited here because none currently passes that would justify L2.

capabilities.title: Browser-facing reduced flagship campaigns
capabilities.notes: Does not currently build against the working tree (bead f85xj.2.39: reads a field the in-flight fs-neuroshape-e2e change removed). No test evidence cited because the crate cannot be exercised in place.
